metadata.campaign_name: B2B SaaS Project Management Tool Launch

best_practices: Product-led growth common in SaaS (Slack, Notion, Airtable models)
Free trial conversion rates: 2-5% industry average
B2B buying process: 3-6 months, 6-10 decision makers
Content marketing + product demos drive highest quality leads
competitive_insights: Monday.com: Visual brand, workflow automation emphasis

channel_benchmarks.content_marketing: 6-12 months to ROI, 3x more leads than paid

internal_analysis.product_positioning: AI-powered project management that reduces planning time by 60%
internal_analysis.target_icp: Operations managers at 50-500 employee tech companies
internal_analysis.differentiation: AI suggests optimal task allocation based on team capacity and skills

key_insights: Product-led growth with freemium fits market expectations
AI differentiation is compelling but needs proof
Content + product demos will be primary strategy
Competitors are established - need clear differentiation angle
opportunities: AI angle is unique and timely
Can build community early around AI + productivity
Template library can drive SEO + product adoption

primary_icp.title: Operations Manager / Project Manager
pain_points: Poor visibility into capacity and workload
Inefficient task allocation (gut feel, not data)
Tool fatigue - too many disconnected tools

desired_outcomes.functional: Optimize team workload, reduce planning time
desired_outcomes.social: Be seen as strategic ops leader

jtbd.trigger: Team missed deadline or someone burned out

forces.push: Current planning is manual and time-consuming
forces.habit: Comfortable with current tool (even if painful)

value_proposition.core_promise: Stop guessing who should work on what. Our AI optimizes task allocation based on capacity, skills, and project priorities - in seconds, not hours.
proof_points: Reduces planning time by 60% (beta customer data)
Learns from your team's actual work patterns
value_proposition.differentiation: Only PM tool with AI-powered workload optimization
value_proposition.positioning_statement: TaskFlow is the AI-powered project management tool that eliminates planning guesswork for mid-market operations managers who are tired of manual capacity planning, unlike Asana or Monday, because our AI actually understands your team's capabilities and workload.

messaging_hierarchy.headline: Stop Guessing. Start Optimizing. AI-Powered Project Planning.
messaging_hierarchy.subheadline: TaskFlow's AI suggests optimal task allocation in seconds - so your team works smarter, not harder.
supporting_messages: 60% less time planning, 100% more confidence in your decisions
Prevent burnout before it happens with capacity forecasting
AI that learns from your team - not generic suggestions

primary_channels.rationale: Long-term, high-quality leads. OpsManagers research online.
Let product sell itself. Low friction.

experimental.hypothesis: Can reach OpsManagers with AI angle at acceptable CPA

growth_levers.acquisition: SEO content + paid search for high-intent keywords
growth_levers.activation: AI suggestions in first session (aha moment)
growth_levers.referral: Share capacity reports with stakeholders (viral loop)

phase_3_scale.objective: Scale winners and hit customer target
tactics: Launch LinkedIn Ads if Google profitable

topics: Complete Guide to Capacity Planning for Project Managers
5 Signs Your Team is Overcommitted (And How to Fix It)
How AI is Transforming Project Management in 2025
AI vs. Manual Planning: A Real Comparison

angle_1_pain_amplification.headline: Another Missed Deadline? Your Team Might Be Overcommitted.
angle_1_pain_amplification.body: Stop guessing who can take on more work. TaskFlow's AI shows exactly who has capacity - in real-time.

angle_2_time_savings.headline: Spend 10 Minutes Planning, Not 3 Hours
angle_2_time_savings.body: TaskFlow's AI suggests optimal task allocation instantly. Get back to strategic work.

angle_3_social_proof.headline: Why 300+ Ops Managers Switched to TaskFlow
angle_3_social_proof.body: Better plans. Happier teams. Fewer surprises. See what AI-powered planning can do.

hero.headline: Stop Guessing. Start Optimizing.
hero.subheadline: AI-powered task allocation that prevents burnout and missed deadlines.

social_proof.testimonial: TaskFlow cut our planning time in half. The AI actually understands our team. - Jane, Ops Manager @ TechCo

landing_page_structure.demo_section: Interactive demo or video showing AI in action

experiment_1_messaging.hypothesis: Pain amplification angle ('Another missed deadline?') will outperform time savings angle by 20%+ in click-through rate

experiment_2_landing_page.hypothesis: Adding specific time savings ('60% faster') to hero will increase trial signups by 15%+

experiment_3_onboarding.hypothesis: Showing AI suggestion in first 2 minutes will increase activation by 25%+

level_2_channels.product_trial: 50% activation rate (AI usage in first session)

level_3_tactics.content_performance: Avg. time on page > 3 min, bounce < 60%

decision_rules.scale: If CPA < $120 for 7 days, increase budget 50%
decision_rules.pivot: If CPA > $180 for 14 days, pause and redesign
decision_rules.kill: If CPA > $250 after redesign, abandon channel

key_learnings_to_track: What's the real CAC per channel?
